title: RepoCleanRequest
description: Inputs for the repo_clean skill (CCW-MVP13). Scans the repository for clutter without modifying the filesystem.

root.description: Directory to scan. Resolved to an absolute path at runtime.

scan_only.description: Must be set to false explicitly to allow any future write mode (not yet implemented). Effectively always scan-only.

patterns.description: Additional glob patterns (applied to filenames) to flag as clutter, merged with the built-in defaults.
